steps.title: Identify the positive signal
steps.content: The passage signals strong approval: the reception has been “very good” and the book won the Asian/Pacific American Award for Literature.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Applauded means praised or showed approval, which directly matches these signals. The other three are either critical, confused, or dismissive—all contradicting the evidence of strong reception and an award. That matches choice B — B is correct.
